## Please submit new request only if you and your project satisfy all fallowing requirements:

- [ ] You can read and understand English
- [ ] The projects is hosted at github repo
- [ ] The project is standalone software. It is not a wrapper/proxy to remote commercial/free service.
- [ ] The project's age is AT LEAST HALF A YEAR
- [ ] The projects IS NOT ABOUT AI agents

## Required information about the project

Just put here link to github repo. You can also provide SHORT plain-text discription (100-200 characters). If you projects is valid, it will be put into most suitable category in the list.
